sqlMap.select: select * from dropdown where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into dropdown(propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno name dropdowntype dataobject metaobject sorted applid seq ) values (#propertyno:NUMERIC#, #propertyversionno:NUMERIC#, #metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC# #name# #dropdowntype# #dataobject# #metaobject# #sorted# #applid# #seq# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('dropdown') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select dropdownno, name, dropdowntype, dataobject, metaobject, sorted, applid, seq, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from dropdown where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update dropdown set
name = #name# name = null dropdowntype = #dropdowntype# dropdowntype = null dataobject = #dataobject# dataobject = null metaobject = #metaobject# metaobject = null sorted = #sorted# sorted = null applid = #applid# applid = null seq = #seq# seq = null
where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from dropdown where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from dropdown where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select dropdownno, name, dropdowntype, dataobject, metaobject, sorted, applid, seq, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from dropdown where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#

select dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, name, dropdowntype, dataobject, metaobject, sorted from dropdown where propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
